feature.name: DAG topological sorting
feature.description: Extract NetworkX directed-acyclic-graph topological sort APIs as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: construct directed graphs and add edges
yield nodes in topological sort order for DAGs
raise NetworkXError for undirected graphs and NetworkXUnfeasible for cycles
excluded_behaviors: full NetworkX algorithm suite and drawing backends
graph I/O formats and generators beyond empty_graph helper

entanglement.description: Topological ordering depends on DiGraph adjacency views, indegree bookkeeping, and exception types across multiple class modules.
signals: DiGraph succ/pred views and edge mutation
graph class hierarchy shared with convert helpers

output.import: from featurelifted import DiGraph, Graph, topological_sort, topological_generations, lexicographical_topological_sort, is_directed_acyclic_graph; from featurelifted.exception import NetworkXError, NetworkXUnfeasible
